channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: We Asked a Dietitian If Magnesium-Rich Foods Can Lower Blood Pressure - Verywell Health
item.description:
1. We Asked a Dietitian If Magnesium-Rich Foods Can Lower Blood Pressure  Verywell Health
  2. 10 Magnesium-Rich Foods Dietitians Swear By  Health: Trusted and Empathetic Health and Wellness Information
  3. This one nutrient could be the key to better sleep and lower blood pressure, say doctors  MSN
  4. The magnesium-rich vegetable that's filled with antioxidants  Good Housekeeping
  5. Dietitians Are Begging People To Stop Taking This Common Supplement With Magnesium  Closer Weekly

item.title: New Alzheimer’s Discovery Could Change How Scientists Fight the Disease - SciTechDaily
item.description:
1. New Alzheimer’s Discovery Could Change How Scientists Fight the Disease  SciTechDaily
  2. Scientists Found 2 Existing Drugs Could Reverse Alzheimer's Brain Damage in Mice  Yahoo
  3. Scientists found a new Alzheimer’s trigger and a drug that stops it  ScienceDaily
  4. New Compound Blocks Nerve Cell Death in Alzheimer’s  Neuroscience News
  5. New drug could slow the development of Alzheimer's  Medical Xpress

item.title: Identical Twin Sisters, 24, Say It's 'Unthinkable' to Be Apart After One Is Given '6 Months to Live' amid Terminal Diagnosis - Yahoo
item.description:
1. Identical Twin Sisters, 24, Say It's 'Unthinkable' to Be Apart After One Is Given '6 Months to Live' amid Terminal Diagnosis  Yahoo
  2. Cardiff woman with acute myeloid leukaemia says leaving twin is 'unthinkable'  BBC
  3. Identical Twin, 24, Is Given '6 Months to Live' After Terminal Cancer Diagnosis  People.com
  4. 'I had a rash that wouldn't go away - now I've got six months to live'  The Mirror
  5. ‘I don’t want our story to end here’: Twin, 24, given six months to live  PressReader
